Health and Sport

Health

At Doğuş University Health Services Centre, examination, remote treatment, emergency interventions are performed and psychological support is provided.

Dogus University students and employees can benefit from the Health Services Centre where
    specialist physicians, specialist psychologists and nurses are located, without paying any fees when they need them. Patient rights are attached great importance and treated with a great care and confidentiality. Patients are sent to secondary and
    tertiary health care institutions when necessary.

Sports

The Wellness Centre of the university has been recognised by students to pursue a college life that is intertwined with sports. In the field and studios in the centre; indoor football, basketball, volleyball, handball,
    tennis, table tennis,  dance, pilates facilities are offered. All students at Dogus University can benefit from sports facilities at no charge.
